description: GastroFlow skills — full implementation contracts for agentic AI reconstruction

AccountingAgent.description: Calcula el cierre de caja diario comparando ventas vs facturas emitidas.

VAT_RATE.usage: Single source of truth for 21% VAT. Import this everywhere; never hardcode 0.21.

computeInvoiceFigures.signature: (items: OrderItem[]) => { subtotal: number, vat: number, total: number }
computeInvoiceFigures.description: Implements Invariant B-1. Derives totals from line items. Never rounds manually.
computeInvoiceFigures.logic: subtotal = Σ(item.price × item.qty); vat = subtotal × VAT_RATE; total = subtotal + vat

validateInvoiceable.description: Implements Invariant B-2. Returns error if order has no customerId.
validateInvoiceable.logic: if (!order.customerId) return { valid: false, error: 'El pedido necesita un cliente asignado.' }; return { valid: true }

generateJournalEntries.description: Implements Invariant B-5. Returns exactly 3 balanced double-entry journal entries.

computeDailyClosure.signature: (invoices: Invoice[], orders: Order[]) => { totalRevenue, totalVat, totalSubtotal, invoiceCount, pendingCount, chartData }
computeDailyClosure.description: Aggregates data for AccountingView. chartData is an array of { name, ventas, iva } for recharts BarChart.
computeDailyClosure.logic: Sum all invoices for revenue/VAT. pendingCount = orders with status !== 'invoiced'. chartData groups by day or invoice number.

formatCurrency.description: Formats number as Spanish Euro currency. Must be used for ALL monetary display in components.

InvoiceGen.description: Renderiza un documento profesional listo para imprimir o enviar por WhatsApp.

generateInvoiceNumber.logic: Pad (existingInvoices.length + 1) to 3 digits. Use current year.

renderInvoiceText.description: Returns WhatsApp-ready plain text with emoji formatting. Used for wa.me deep-link.

format.item_line_rule: const label = qty > 1 ? `${name} (x${qty})` : name; const dots = '.'.repeat(Math.max(3, 33 - label.length)); return `• ${label} ${dots} ${fmt(lineTotal)}`

renderInvoiceHTML.description: Returns printable HTML string injected into an iframe for window.print(). Styled with inline CSS for print compatibility.
renderInvoiceHTML.usage: Used in InvoiceDocument component. Create a Blob URL from the HTML string and embed in <iframe>.

TaxLogic.description: Clasifica automáticamente cada ítem en la categoría impositiva correcta.

classifyItem.signature: (item: { name: string, category?: string }) => keyof TAX_CATEGORIES
classifyItem.description: Classifies a menu item into a tax category using keyword matching on name/category.

classifyOrderItems.signature: (items: OrderItem[]) => { category: string, label: string, rate: number, subtotal: number, vat: number }[]
classifyOrderItems.description: Groups order items by tax category. Returns breakdown for AccountingView display.
classifyOrderItems.usage: Used to show itemized tax breakdown per category in the accounting view.

UISystem.description: Design system and component patterns for consistent UI reconstruction.

icon_usage.FileText: Invoices nav item + generate invoice button

StateManagement.description: Global state architecture using React context + useReducer.
StateManagement.pattern: AppContext (createContext + useReducer) + AppProvider + useApp hook (separate file)

reducer_actions.ADD_ORDER: payload: Order — appends to orders array
reducer_actions.ADD_INVOICE: payload: Invoice — appends invoice, updates matching order.status to 'invoiced'
reducer_actions.SET_NOTIFICATION: payload: { type, message } — sets notification, triggers 3s auto-clear
reducer_actions.CLEAR_NOTIFICATION: no payload — sets notification to null

useApp.returns: Full AppContext value. Throws if used outside AppProvider.
useApp.hmr_rule: Must be in its own file — NOT in AppContext.jsx (HMR constraint T-3)

useOrders.enrichment: Joins customer, computes subtotal/vat/total, joins invoice for each order
